phrases.intent_en: Ask what the Belle Époque buildings along the Promenade are used for today
phrases.text_local: À quoi servent aujourd'hui ces bâtiments de la Belle Époque le long de la Promenade ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah KWAH SEHR oh-zhoor-DWEE say bah-tee-MAN deh lah bel ay-POK leh LON deh lah pro-meh-NAHD
phrases.cultural_note: The grand Belle Époque buildings along the Promenade house luxury hotels, apartments and a few historic casinos.

responses.english: It is on the Promenade des Anglais, near the pier.
responses.phonetic: OO suh TROOV luh BYOO-roh dan-for-ma-SYOHN too-ris-TEEK luh PLEW/PLEWS PROSH
responses.french: Il est sur la Promenade des Anglais, près de la jetée.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the best luxury shopping is in this area
phrases.text_local: Où se trouvent les meilleures boutiques de luxe dans ce quartier ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo seh TROOV lay may-YUHR boo-TEEK deh LYOOKS dan seh kar-TYAY
phrases.cultural_note: Avenue de Suède and Rue Paradis in the New Town host Riviera luxury brands and designer boutiques.

responses.phonetic: ESS suh kuh SET PLAHZ ess ay PEW-bleek oo PREE-vay

phrases.text_local: Le Jardin Albert Premier est-il accessible librement ?
phrases.pronunciation: leh zhar-DAN al-BEHR preh-MYAY eh-TEEL ak-se-SEEBL lee-breh-MAN
phrases.cultural_note: The Jardin Albert 1er connects Place Masséna to the seafront and hosts outdoor concerts and events in summer.

responses.phonetic: bawn-ZHOOR luh zhar-DA(N) EH, ay eel grah-TWEE
responses.french: L'entrée est gratuite, s'il vous plaît.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a recommendation for a good hotel near the Promenade
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous me recommander un bon hôtel à proximité de la Promenade ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY voo meh reh-ko-man-DAY un bon o-TEL ah prok-see-mee-TAY deh lah pro-meh-NAHD
phrases.cultural_note: The Promenade area has options at every price level — from the legendary Negresco to boutique hotels in side streets.

responses.english: The tram stop is right across, on the avenue.
responses.phonetic: OO es te-LA-re duh TRAM luh PLOO ploo PROSH
responses.french: L'arrêt de tram est juste en face, sur l'avenue.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to rent a bicycle to cycle along the Promenade
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je louer un vélo pour longer la Promenade des Anglais ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zheh loo-AY un VAY-lo poor lon-ZHAY lah pro-meh-NAHD day zon-GLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Vélo Bleu stations are dotted all along the Promenade — the 7km cycling lane is completely flat and traffic-free.

responses.english: There are Vélo Bleu stations everywhere.
responses.phonetic: OO pwee zhuh LWAY uhn ve-LOH poor lawn-ZHAY la pro
responses.french: Il y a des stations Vélo Bleu partout.
